briefs.title: Solar panel racking systems and foundations now exempt from BC school taxes
briefs.summary: Starting December 31, 2025, BC solar power projects get a school tax exemption (a property-related tax charged on improvements) for their panel racking systems and the foundations that support them.
briefs.action_required: Review your solar project's tax filings to claim the school tax exemption on racking systems and foundations from Dec 31, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC School Tax Exemption for solar racking systems and foundations takes effect
